also 966529 this is a customer account number , just exctact and store it somewhere we need that to make another api call to fetch all contacts for that account number and add contacts to order if prechecks failed where contacts are not set : 

below is call to fetch all available contacts for customer number in below sample call 966529 is customer nimber  , call belwo api when there is not contacts assiciated that precheck failed we need to find available conatcts and take first contactid from respsone and assocaited to order.

i wil tell in future how to add contacts to order , first we need to test below api if it fetches contacts then need to implement 



get call 
Test1 :  http://swiftenv1/OrderPackage/Contacts/LoadAvailableContacts?customerId=966529
Test2 :  http://swiftenv2/OrderPackage/Contacts/LoadAvailableContacts?customerId=966529
Test4 :  http://swiftenv2/OrderPackage/Contacts/LoadAvailableContacts?customerId=966529
